clusters.headline: Azerbaijan issues rare rebuke against key ally Israel over Armenian genocide recognition
clusters.summary:
Azerbaijan issues rare rebuke against key ally Israel over Armenian genocide recognition

    
    

        
    
                The Israeli government’s decision on Sunday to formally recognise the Armenian genocide has drawn a rare rebuke from Azerbaijan, a close Israeli

clusters.headline: U.S. and Iran exchange strikes, underscoring the fragility of the ceasefire
clusters.summary: President Trump accused Iran of violating their framework agreement, and Tehran threatened to halt negotiations with the U.S. entirely. Meanwhile, violence continued between Israel and Hezbollah.

clusters.headline: Netherlands vs Morocco: FIFA World Cup Round of 32: Prediction, team news
clusters.summary: A rare meeting of the top 10 ranked teams sees Morocco take on the Netherlands in the round of 32 in Monterrey, Mexico.

clusters.headline: Senior South African police officer survives assassination attempt
clusters.summary: Deputy crime intelligence boss Maj-Gen Feroz Khan was due to appear before an inquiry into police corruption this week.

clusters.headline: Kpod user who drove against traffic, causing crash, jailed in first such case since etomidate listed as drug
clusters.summary: The victim saw Ng Bing Hong's vehicle approaching his and reversed but could not avoid a collision.

clusters.headline: Kenya: Kibera Court Hands Two Men Combined 70-Year Jail Term for Violent Robbery and Sexual Assault
clusters.summary: [Capital FM] Nairobi -- Two men convicted of robbery and sexual assault have each been handed consecutive prison sentences totaling 70 years after the Office of the Director of Public Prosecutions (ODPP) successfully secured their conviction at the Kibera Law Courts.

clusters.headline: South Africa: Ramaphosa Warns Protesters Against Violence Before Anti-Migrant Demonstrations
clusters.summary: [Capital FM] Nairobi -- South African President Cyril Ramaphosa has issued a firm warning that any criminal conduct during planned nationwide protests against undocumented immigration will be met with the full force of the law, as several African governments move to evacuate thousands of their citiz

clusters.headline: Nigeria: We Recovered the Biggest Haul of Terrorists' Equipment in Nigeria Since 9-11 - U.S.
clusters.summary: [This Day] The United States has disclosed that the cache of seized materials from terrorists during its recent raid in Nigeria was the largest haul of enemy electronic equipment recovered since the September 11, 2001, terrorist attacks.

clusters.headline: MOH to revoke licence of LC Nursing Home in Siglap after finding lapses in care and safety
clusters.summary: The Health Ministry found serious lapses at LC Nursing Home, including staff members administering medication without suitable credentials.

clusters.headline: More seniors level up with esports pro training aimed at boosting reflexes, digital skills
clusters.summary: Some 2,400 coaching sessions will be conducted at gaming facilities in Bishan, Pasir Ris and Jurong West.

clusters.headline: Singapore Airlines and Air China sign MOU to deepen cooperation, expand codeshare services
clusters.summary: Under the agreement, the airlines could expand their codeshare partnership to additional routes between Singapore and mainland China, within China and to destinations beyond the two countries.

clusters.headline: 'I buried my parents one day after the other' - Ebola mourners learn how to grieve safely
clusters.summary: A cemetery at the epicentre of the outbreak is rapidly filling up, however large traditional funerals have been scrapped.
